claim: No Stable, release, conformance, manual assistive-technology, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: A semantic-neutral root and body surround content rendered as a consumer-selected div, header, or footer.
semantics.landmarks: No landmark is fabricated. Consumers choose header/footer only when that landmark meaning is correct in the surrounding document.
semantics.focusModel: StickyRegion adds no tab stop and never moves focus; focus descendants retain normal DOM order.
semantics.refTargets: Root and Body refs target HTMLDivElement; Content ref targets its selected HTMLElement.

focusNotObscured.measurement: ResizeObserver measures the sticky content block size after hydration and when zoom, localization, fonts, or text wrapping change it.
focusNotObscured.fallback: estimatedSize supplies a deterministic server/no-observer scroll offset, defaulting to 44 CSS pixels.
focusNotObscured.clearance: The occupied scroll-padding edge and focus descendants' logical scroll-margin include measured size, token offset, safe-area inset, and focus offset.
focusNotObscured.scope: contained mode owns its scrollport; page mode applies descendant scroll margins for the nearest scrolling ancestor.

responsive.zoom: No fixed content height is set; observer measurements follow block-size changes at text resize and zoom.
responsive.safeArea: Physical top/bottom safe-area insets are applied to the corresponding logical block edge for supported horizontal writing modes.
responsive.shortViewport: viewport sizing uses dynamic block units and subtracts safe-area insets.

consumerResponsibilities: For block-start place Content before Body; for block-end place Content after Body so reading and visual order remain coherent.
Choose header/footer only when it is correct for the surrounding landmark structure and heading hierarchy.
Set estimatedSize close to the server-rendered sticky content when JavaScript may be delayed or unavailable.
Revalidate focus clearance after adding nested scrolling, transforms, consumer z-index, custom sticky positioning, or unsupported vertical writing modes.
